title: Color palette view
hypothesis: Visual distribution patterns correlate with set quality perception

visualization_results.interpretation: Personas are strongly separated in trait space (cosine distance 0.762), reflecting distinct archetypes — DevOps engineer vs. freelance designer share almost no vocabulary overlap.

rationale: Spread score 0.762 far exceeds the 0.3 threshold for STRONG signal. HTML renders correctly. The metric meaningfully captures persona distinctiveness.
